action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC 0.7549 with top-10 models and k=200. Trend shows sharper weighting on fewer top models helps. Remaining time ~1.4 min, 2 iterations left. Analysis: Try even more aggressive selection - top-8 with k=500 to focus more on the very best models. Decision: Quick predict.py tweak and submit eval immediately.
